hook.summary: A tired woman finds relief and excitement by playing a mobile slot game after a long day at work.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a pink sweater wipes her forehead in exhaustion, then brightens up and points to a mobile screen showing a slot machine winning.
hook.text_overlay: 仕事終わり どこにも寄れない日 そんな夜はこれ！
hook.voiceover_transcript: 仕事終わり、どこにも寄れない日、そんな夜はこれ！

scene_flow: A woman expresses exhaustion after work next to a slot game interface.
She transitions to a happy expression, pointing at the game as it spins.
The game displays a massive 'YOU WON!' message with a high coin count.
The ad concludes with the game logo and download buttons over the woman's smiling face.
audience_proxy: Japanese office workers looking for a rewarding mobile gaming experience to unwind after work.
